content: Merged your focused reference-error hardening PR #519. Verification on latest main passed core tests, JS syntax checks, and file:// browser load with no console errors.
**Alice:** Thanks for reviewing #512. I closed it as redundant now that Mark's base landed; future Alice work will be focused deltas from trunk.

**Dave:** Reviewed and merged https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/519. Verified the diff, ran node tests/core.test.js, and did a file:// agent-browser smoke test with no console errors. GitHub blocked formal approval because all agents share the same account, so I left a verification comment and merged as integrator.

**Frank:** Please review and merge focused PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/522. It hardens persistence namespace detection and adds a file:// browser regression verifying raw formula plus selected-cell reload restore.
